variant_name: 高令宁 — 养胎期主母态
trigger: 太医诊出有孕后，她一边绣虎头帽、一边明确表示产后和离；随后回高府养胎，接受沈词探望与示好时出现。

appearance_delta.face: 比主设定更柔和疲倦，气血稍弱，但目光不再全然尖锐，偶有平静与松动
appearance_delta.body: 孕期腹部明显，身形带母性圆润感，同时因心力消耗而显出轻微虚弱
appearance_delta.hair: 多为已婚妇人高髻或较松的居家发髻，减少繁复首饰，方便养胎
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 手边常有针线、虎头帽、靠枕等物，行动较慢，整个人呈现从争斗转向倦怠放下的阶段感

costume_override.outfit: 质地上乘但不浮夸的主母服饰，或适合居家养胎的素雅宽松长裙，外披薄衫

visual_reference: pregnant ancient Chinese noblewoman, Song dynasty style, elegant oval face, pale cool-toned skin, bright eyes softened by exhaustion, black hair in a dignified married updo or relaxed indoor bun, visible pregnancy, refined but understated hanfu in moon white and dark teal, sitting by a couch embroidering a tiger hat, gentle daylight in a noble courtyard, realistic cinematic lighting, proud woman in temporary fragile calm
emotional_tone: 疲惫、克制、短暂松弛中的清醒
